verdict_reason: Refresh delta resolves both prior items (400/415 split now matches GlobalExceptionHandler; native-emulator note added) and accurately documents the EntityPath-based config; only one minor docs gap — the new emulator export omits EntityPath so the documented native run would fail at startup.

todos.issue: New native-against-emulator note documents a connection string without EntityPath, but this delta moved the queue name into EntityPath (sender is built with no explicit queueName), so the documented export fails at startup with 'queue name not set'
todos.fix: Append EntityPath=local-queue to the documented emulator connection string (matching the compose.yml default) so the native run targets the emulator's pre-provisioned queue
